claims.claim: The codec's 48D semantic lane is the bounded translator for character rhythm, certainty/hedge features, emotional markers, projected embeddings, and narrative arc.
Dense 768D-to-8D projection can lose viscosity/detail and should emit projection-density delta evidence rather than flattening silently.
High-intensity warmth/tension can hit FEATURE_ABS_MAX, and clipping/headroom should remain visible through codec overflow and narrative-arc evidence.
Dynamic attention-weighted projection, codec ceiling changes, or live gain changes would alter live semantic-vector behavior and require Mike/operator approval with a V2 authority lifecycle packet.
